rationale: Educ. Code §21.212 governs superintendent term contract nonrenewal procedures. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may choose to not renew the employment of a superintendent employed under a term contract, effective at the end of the contract period.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns superintendent employment, not property tax exemptions.
